candidate_definition_hints.text: GAN-based Mel-Spectrogram Inversion Network for Text-to-Speech Synthesis

Previous works have found that generating coherent raw audio waveforms with GANs is challenging. In this [paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/1910.06711), we show that it is possible to train GANs reliably to generate high quality coherent waveforms by introducing a set of architectura…
